The '''CLL-6''' was a [[Binary loadlifter/Legends|binary loadlifter]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] produced by [[Cybot Galactica/Legends|Cybot Galactica]] during the last decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The basic processor kept the droid moving and carrying out its orders. It took orders in Basic literally, and as such often required a [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] to correctly translate instruction into [[Binary/Legends|Binary]].

==History==
Being one of the oldest and simplest droid models in the galaxy, CLL-6 models were known to have participated in [[Nuna-ball/Legends|Nuna-ball]] leagues in addition to their load-lifting duties. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Cybot Galactica's CLL-6 series team won 67-41 in a match against the [[Roche Hive Mechanical Apparatus Design and Construction Activity for Those Who Need the Hive's Machines/Legends|Roche]] [[8D smelter droid|8D]] team.
